plan: Restate the problem: Isabella Johansson (zip 32286) has an order mistakenly shipped to Texas, needs the tracking number, and wants to initiate a return for all items in the order except the pet bed; she does not have the order number and the situation is urgent.
Identify unknowns: the order number (not remembered), the tracking number (to be looked up), and the list of items in the order (needed to specify what to return).

Contact customer support, provide name and zip code (Isabella Johansson, 32286) to look up the order without an order number, obtain the tracking number, flag the urgency of the misdirected shipment, and request a return for all items in the order except the pet bed.
